title: Korean-Style Pan-Seared Mandu with Date Reduction Sauce
description: A sweet and savory twist on traditional Korean mandu, served with a rich date reduction sauce.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the ginger and garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the mandu and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer the mandu to a plate and cover with foil to keep warm.
In the same skillet, add the dates, soy sauce, brown sugar, and rice vinegar.
Bring to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the chopped green onions.
Serve the mandu with the date reduction sauce spooned over the top.
